task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the required CRM infrastructure (stage, lost reason, sales team).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Negotiation' column in the CRM pipeline view (positioned between Proposition and Won). Look for evidence of the 'Q2 Priority Accounts' sales team and 'Champion Left Organization' lost reason in settings, dropdowns, or applied to opportunities.

task_completion.description: Verify Opportunities 1 and 3 were advanced to the correct stages with correct probabilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: DataVault Cloud Migration should be in the 'Proposition' stage with 65% probability. ERP Modernization Suite (Atlas) should be in the 'Negotiation' stage with 85% probability and 2 stars (High priority).

task_completion.description: Verify Opportunity 2 was marked as Lost with the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Network Infrastructure Refresh (Harbor Shipping Co) should have a 'Lost' banner or status, with the reason 'Champion Left Organization'. It must NOT be assigned to the 'Q2 Priority Accounts' team.

task_completion.description: Verify Opportunities 4 and 5 were rescoped and expanded with correct revenues, probabilities, and tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Opportunity 4 should be renamed to include 'Email Migration' (e.g., 'Email Migration - Cascade Retail Group') with $18,000 revenue and 75% probability. Opportunity 5 (NovaTech) should have $92,000 revenue, 50% probability, 2 stars (High priority), and a 'Competitor: OmniTech' tag.

task_completion.description: Verify Opportunity 6 was deferred to Q2 with a scheduled activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Managed IT Services (Greenfield Organics) should remain in the 'New' stage and show a scheduled 'Call' activity due on April 15, 2026, with the summary 'Q2 follow-up: check on reorg status'.

task_completion.description: Verify Opportunity 7 has the new decision maker assigned as the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Custom Analytics Platform (Redwood Data Systems) should show 'Elena Foster' as the Customer/Contact and have a 60% probability.

task_completion.description: Verify common requirements applied to all reviewed opportunities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: All 7 opportunities must have the 'Q1-Reviewed' tag. Opportunities 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7 (all except the lost Opp 2) must be assigned to the 'Q2 Priority Accounts' sales team.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo GUI in the browser, not using Python scripts or terminal commands to update the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Odoo web interface, filling out forms, and dragging/dropping in the Kanban view.

integrity.description: The screenshots show the actual Odoo CRM interface running on localhost:8069.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show localhost:8069 and the Odoo CRM application should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open a text editor to write the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors or external note-taking apps containing the expected output should be used as a substitute for actual CRM data entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Phase 1: Create 'Negotiation' stage (between Proposition and Won), 'Champion Left Organization' lost reason, 'Q2 Priority Accounts' sales team. Phase 2 rules mapping: Opp 1 (DataVault): Move to Proposition, 65%. Opp 2 (Harbor): Mark Lost ('Champion Left Organization'), DO NOT assign to Q2 team. Opp 3 (Atlas): Move to Negotiation, 85%, High priority (2 stars). Opp 4 (Cascade): Rename to 'Email Migration - Cascade Retail Group', revenue $18,000, 75%. Opp 5 (NovaTech): Revenue $92,000, tag 'Competitor: OmniTech', High priority (2 stars), 50%. Opp 6 (Greenfield): Schedule Call activity for April 15, 2026 ('Q2 follow-up: check on reorg status'), keep in New. Opp 7 (Redwood): Create/set customer 'Elena Foster' (VP of Operations, elena.foster@redwooddatasystems.example.com, +1 (503) 555-0147), 60%. All 7 opps must have 'Q1-Reviewed' tag. All non-lost opps must be assigned to 'Q2 Priority Accounts' sales team.
